ALREADY_WITHDRAWN: Account withdrawal has already been completed
CONFIRM_HANDLE_MISMATCH: The confirmation handle does not match
EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED: This email address is already in use
EMAIL_INVALID: Please enter a valid email address
HAS_MEDIA_FILES: Cannot delete: media files are still in use
INVALID_TOKEN: This link is invalid or has expired. Please verify your email again
LIST_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: You have reached the maximum number of lists
LIST_MEMBER_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: You have reached the maximum number of members for this list
LIST_NOT_OWNED: You don't have permission to manage this list
PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters
RENOTE_TARGET_NOT_FOUND: The post to repost was not found
REPLY_TARGET_NOT_FOUND: The post to reply to was not found
RESET_TOKEN_INVALID: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a password reset again
SHORTCODE_TAKEN: This shortcode is already in use
SMTP_NOT_CONFIGURED: Email sending is not configured. Please contact an administrator
TEXT_TOO_LONG: The text exceeds the length limit (this may happen after expanding @usernames)
USERNAME_RESERVED: This username is reserved and cannot be used
USER_ID_OR_USERNAME_REQUIRED: Please specify a user ID or username
INTERNAL_ERROR: The server is not responding. Please wait and try again
SERVER_UNAVAILABLE: The server is not responding. Please wait and try again
NETWORK_ERROR: Could not connect to the server. Please check your network connection
